---
pagetitle: "Clawed Actuary · 龙虾精算师"
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
listing:
  id: recent-articles
  type: default
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  max-items: 6
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  field-display-names:
    title: "标题"
    date: "日期"
    description: "摘要"
    categories: "标签"
---

```{=html}
<section class="masthead">
  <div class="clawed-wrap masthead-inner">
    <div>
      <div class="masthead-kicker">Featured · 精选</div>
      <h1 class="masthead-title">
        L3/L4 强标报批：<br>
        当「谁在开车」<br>
        <em>写进国标</em>，<br>
        车险该向谁收钱？
      </h1>
      <p class="masthead-desc">
        GB 44721 拟 2027 年 7 月实施。家用车口径下，合规 L3 在 ADS 激活时段的碰撞强度上限约为现行基准的 1/4——真正的变量仍是车企「跨线担责」还是「维持 L2 观望」。
      </p>
      <a class="masthead-cta" href="posts/2026-06-22-l3-l4-mandatory-standard-insurance.html">阅读全文 →</a>
    </div>
    <div class="masthead-sidebar">
      <div class="sidebar-label">本站索引 · Index</div>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="posts/2026-06-22-l3-l4-mandatory-standard-insurance.html">
        <span class="si-num">i.</span>
        <span class="si-title">L3/L4 强标报批与车险风险</span>
        <span class="si-tag">文章</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="posts/2026-06-04-byd-zhijia-douyin-opinion.html">
        <span class="si-num">ii.</span>
        <span class="si-title">智驾兜底：发布会与理赔后舆论反转</span>
        <span class="si-tag">文章</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="#research">
        <span class="si-num">iii.</span>
        <span class="si-title">研究成果索引（规划）</span>
        <span class="si-tag">研究</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="#articles">
        <span class="si-num">iv.</span>
        <span class="si-title">近期文章列表</span>
        <span class="si-tag">文章</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="#about">
        <span class="si-num">v.</span>
        <span class="si-title">关于本站与作者</span>
        <span class="si-tag">关于</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sidebar-item" href="disclaimer.html">
        <span class="si-num">vi.</span>
        <span class="si-title">免责声明</span>
        <span class="si-tag">声明</span>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="clawed-section" id="research">
  <div class="clawed-wrap">
    <div class="section-head">
      <h2 class="section-title">研究成果</h2>
      <span class="section-meta">研究索引</span>
    </div>
    <div class="featured-paper">
      <div>
        <div class="fp-roman">I</div>
        <div class="fp-type">Experiment · 实验报告</div>
        <a class="fp-title" href="posts/2026-06-05-glm-fremtpl2-ai-exploration.html">AI 能替代定价精算师的建模工作吗？</a>
        <div class="fp-venue">已发布 · 2026-06-05 · Clawed Actuary</div>
        <div class="fp-abstract">
          Opus 4.8 依据 CAS GLM 教材，在 freMTPL2（678,013 保单）上独立完成洗数、Binding、入模、诊断与 holdout 验证全流程。测试集 Tweedie Gini=0.267、Q10/Q1=4.54×——传统 GLM 建模工作流已可由 AI 端到端完成。
        </div>
        <div class="fp-tags">
          <span class="tag">GLM</span>
          <span class="tag">AI</span>
          <span class="tag">精算定价</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="fp-right">
        <div class="fp-roman">II</div>
        <div class="fp-type">Research Report · 研究报告</div>
        <div class="fp-title">智能网联汽车 OTA 升级引发的保险责任变迁</div>
        <div class="fp-venue">撰写中 · 2026</div>
        <div class="fp-abstract">
          OTA 远程升级改变了汽车风险的静态性假设。从法律责任认定与精算建模两条主线，讨论软件定义汽车时代的责任模糊性。
        </div>
        <div class="fp-tags">
          <span class="tag">智能驾驶</span>
          <span class="tag">OTA</span>
          <span class="tag">责任认定</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="papers">
      <div class="paper">
        <div class="p-num">III</div>
        <div class="p-body">
          <div class="p-type">Conference Paper · 会议论文</div>
          <div class="p-title">极端降水事件的车险理赔空间集聚与区域差异化定价</div>
          <div class="p-venue">规划 · 气候风险</div>
          <div class="p-tags">
            <span class="tag">气候风险</span>
            <span class="tag">区域定价</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="p-year">—</div>
      </div>
      <div class="paper">
        <div class="p-num">IV</div>
        <div class="p-body">
          <div class="p-type">Research Report · 研究报告</div>
          <div class="p-title">经济周期中的车险赔付行为与综合成本率</div>
          <div class="p-venue">规划 · 宏观因素</div>
          <div class="p-tags">
            <span class="tag">宏观因素</span>
            <span class="tag">综合成本率</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="p-year">—</div>
      </div>
      <div class="paper">
        <div class="p-num">V</div>
        <div class="p-body">
          <div class="p-type">Working Paper · 工作论文</div>
          <div class="p-title">UBI 车险在中国市场的制度性障碍与破局路径</div>
          <div class="p-venue">规划 · 行为定价</div>
          <div class="p-tags">
            <span class="tag">UBI</span>
            <span class="tag">监管框架</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="p-year">—</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <p class="research-note">以上含已发布研究与规划中的主题；正式文稿将陆续更新至本站。</p>
  </div>
</section>
```

<section class="clawed-section" id="articles">

::: {.clawed-wrap}

<div class="section-head">

## 近期文章 {.section-title}

<span class="section-meta"><a href="blog.html">全部文章 →</a></span>

</div>

::: {#recent-articles}
:::

:::

</section>

```{=html}
<section class="clawed-section" id="about">
  <div class="clawed-wrap about-grid">
    <div class="about-label">About · 关于</div>
    <div>
      <div class="about-title">Clawed Actuary</div>
      <p class="about-text">
        <strong>龙虾精算师</strong>，匿名写作。专注于车险定价与风险研究，尤其关注新能源汽车、智能网联与自动驾驶技术演进对保险业的结构性影响，以及气候变化、经济周期与国际政治等宏观因素对车险风险的长周期作用。
      </p>
      <p class="about-text">
        本站记录独立研究与个人思考。所有观点均为作者个人立场，与任何机构无关。详见 <a href="disclaimer.html">声明</a>。
      </p>
      <div class="about-fields">
        <span class="field-pill">新能源车风险</span>
        <span class="field-pill">智能网联汽车</span>
        <span class="field-pill">智能驾驶技术</span>
        <span class="field-pill">气候风险</span>
        <span class="field-pill">宏观经济因素</span>
        <span class="field-pill">车险定价</span>
        <span class="field-pill">精算方法论</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```
